name: wiki-chat-workbench
description: Local Wiki Chat Workbench — ChatGPT-style frontend for your personal knowledge wiki

scripts.index: npx tsx scripts/build-wiki-index.ts && npx tsx scripts/build-source-index.ts
scripts.dev: echo 'Run in two terminals:' && echo '  npm run dev:server' && echo '  npm run dev:frontend'
scripts.reindex: npm run index && npm run check
